nodes.name: Watch QUEUE
nodes.notes: Fires when a new .json file lands in QUEUE/. Update path if VAULT_PATH changes.

nodes.name: Read Task
nodes.notes: Reads task JSON, sets route and model. CODE→qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION→minicpm-v:8b, RESEARCH→HANDOFF, all others→qwen3:14b. Returns [] for non-PENDING tasks.

nodes.name: Route?
nodes.notes: true (output 0) → Ollama (CODE=qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION=minicpm-v:8b, default=qwen3:14b). false (output 1) → Non-Ollama Handler (RESEARCH→HANDOFF).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model || 'qwen3:14b', prompt: $json.prompt, stream: false, keep_alive: '10m' }) }}

nodes.name: Call Ollama
nodes.notes: POSTs to Ollama with model from task (CODE=qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION=minicpm-v:8b, default=qwen3:14b). keep_alive=10m. Timeout 5 min.

nodes.name: Write + Log
nodes.notes: HIGH CONFIDENCE → writes OUTPUTS/[task_id]_RESULT.md. LOW → writes HANDOFFS/[task_id]_HANDOFF.json. Always updates task JSON status and appends DECISION_LOG table row.

nodes.name: Non-Ollama Handler
nodes.notes: RESEARCH → writes HANDOFF JSON for Claude. Updates task status to ESCALATED and logs to DECISION_LOG.

_sfv_notes: Import: n8n Settings → Workflows → Import from file
Pre-requisites: run n8n_env.ps1 first — sets OLLAMA_URL, VAULT_PATH, NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs,path
Model routing: CODE→qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION→minicpm-v:8b, CLASSIFY/SUMMARIZE/default→qwen3:14b, RESEARCH→HANDOFF
Confidence routing: HIGH → OUTPUTS/[task_id]_RESULT.md | LOW → HANDOFFS/[task_id]_HANDOFF.json
RESEARCH tasks: write HANDOFF directly for Claude (no Perplexity/Tavily integration active)
keep_alive=10m on all Ollama calls — pairs with Workflow 2 pre-warm cron
